'''dapofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tablemate|tablemate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tablemate|tablemate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dapofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæpefeth|dæpefeth]] || [[word:dæpefej|dæpefej]] || [[word:dæpefesh|dæpefesh]] || [[word:dæpefe|dæpefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dapopofoth|dapopofoth]] || [[word:dapopofoj|dapopofoj]] || [[word:dapopofosh|dapopofosh]] || [[word:dapopofo|dapopofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dapofoth|dapofoth]] || [[word:dapofoj|dapofoj]] || [[word:dapofosh|dapofosh]] || [[word:dapofo|dapofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dapoffoth|dapoffoth]] || [[word:dapoffoj|dapoffoj]] || [[word:dapoffosh|dapoffosh]] || [[word:dapoffof|dapoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dapofotho|dapofotho]] || [[word:dapofojo|dapofojo]] || [[word:dapofosho|dapofosho]] || [[word:dapofoko|dapofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dapofoth|dapofoth]] || [[word:dapofoj|dapofoj]] || [[word:dapofosh|dapofosh]] || [[word:dapofo|dapofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dapofothol|dapofothol]] || [[word:dapofojol|dapofojol]] || [[word:dapofoshol|dapofoshol]] || [[word:dapofokol|dapofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dapofothotho|dapofothotho]] || [[word:dapofojojo|dapofojojo]] || [[word:dapofoshosho|dapofoshosho]] || [[word:dapofoko|dapofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dapofothon|dapofothon]] || [[word:dapofojon|dapofojon]] || [[word:dapofoshon|dapofoshon]] || [[word:dapofokon|dapofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dapofothoro|dapofothoro]] || [[word:dapofojoro|dapofojoro]] || [[word:dapofoshoro|dapofoshoro]] || [[word:dapofokoro|dapofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
